title: Workbenches 3D
description: A resource pack that makes workbenches truly 3D!
body:
# Makes work tables truly 3D!

**This resource pack remodels tables to be 3D while only using vanilla textures.**

It affects:

- Crafting Table
- Smithing Table
- Cartography Table
- Fletching Table

<details>
<summary>How to enable addons</summary>

1. Open resource pack menu and disable Tables 3D
2. Close and re-open resource pack menu (Trust me)
3. Click 'Open Pack Folder'
4. Open 'Tables 3D.zip'
5. Open 'ADDONS' Folder
6. Move desired addon into the 'resourcepacks' folder from Step 3
7. Enable packs with all addons above 'Tables 3D'
8. Click 'Done' 

</details>
